// 🎵 Bass-Sample-Sequenz — selbst-enthaltend (kein Hosting nötig)
// Copy-paste nach https://strudel.tidalcycles.org

// 1) Samples als Data-URIs laden
const bassSamples = {
  bass_A2: "data:audio/wav;base64,",
  bass_C2: "data:audio/wav;base64,",
  bass_Cs2: "data:audio/wav;base64,",
  bass_D2: "data:audio/wav;base64,",
  bass_Ds2: "data:audio/wav;base64,",
  bass_E2: "data:audio/wav;base64,",
  bass_G2: "data:audio/wav;base64,",
  bass_Gs2: "data:audio/wav;base64,",
};

await samples(bassSamples);

// 2) Sequenz-Pattern (155.88 BPM, 16th-note Grid)
setcps(2.5980)

s("
[bass_C2 ~ [bass_Cs2+bass_D2] ~ bass_C2 ~ ~ bass_Ds2 bass_D2 bass_C2 ~ bass_D2 bass_Cs2 ~ bass_Ds2 ~]
[~ ~ ~ bass_D2 bass_C2 bass_Cs2 bass_D2 bass_D2 bass_Cs2 [bass_Cs2+bass_Cs2] ~ bass_Ds2 ~ ~ [bass_Cs2+bass_D2] bass_Ds2]
[bass_C2 ~ bass_Ds2 ~ bass_C2 ~ ~ bass_Ds2 bass_Cs2 ~ ~ ~ bass_C2 ~ ~ bass_Ds2]
[bass_Cs2 ~ bass_D2 ~ bass_C2 ~ ~ bass_Ds2 ~ ~ [bass_Cs2+bass_Ds2] bass_D2 ~ ~ bass_E2 bass_Ds2]
[bass_Gs2 bass_Gs2 bass_G2 ~ ~ [bass_Gs2+bass_G2] bass_G2 ~ ~ [bass_A2+bass_G2] bass_G2 ~ [bass_A2+bass_Gs2] bass_G2 bass_G2 bass_A2]
[bass_A2 bass_G2 bass_G2 bass_G2 bass_Gs2 ~ bass_G2 bass_A2 ~ [bass_A2+bass_G2] bass_G2 ~ bass_A2 bass_Gs2 bass_G2 ~]
[~ bass_A2 bass_G2 ~ bass_A2 bass_G2 bass_G2 bass_A2 bass_A2 bass_Gs2 bass_G2 ~ bass_A2 bass_G2 bass_G2 bass_A2]
[~ ~ bass_G2 bass_A2 ~ bass_G2 bass_G2 ~ [bass_A2+bass_Gs2] bass_Gs2 bass_G2 ~ bass_A2 bass_G2 bass_G2 ~]
[bass_A2 bass_Gs2 bass_G2 ~ bass_A2 bass_G2 bass_G2 ~ ~ bass_G2 bass_G2 bass_A2 bass_Gs2 ~ bass_G2 ~]
[bass_A2 bass_G2 bass_G2 bass_A2 bass_Gs2 ~ bass_G2 ~ [bass_A2+bass_A2] bass_G2 bass_G2 ~]
")
  .decay(0.2).sustain(0.1)
  .lpf(600).gain(0.8).room(0.1)
